title: Dining Room and Cafeteria Attendants and Bartender Helpers
description: Facilitate food service. Clean tables; remove dirty dishes; replace soiled table linens; set tables; replenish supply of clean linens, silverware, glassware, and dishes; supply service bar with food; and serve items such as water, condiments, and coffee to patrons.

tasks.text: Run cash registers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve ice water, coffee, rolls, or butter to patrons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scrape and stack dirty dishes and carry dishes and other tableware to kitchens for cleaning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wipe tables or seats with dampened cloths or replace dirty tablecloths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set tables with clean linens, condiments, or other supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet and seat customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean up spilled food or drink or broken dishes and remove empty bottles and trash.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain adequate supplies of items, such as clean linens, silverware, glassware, dishes, or trays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate items requested by customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill beverage or ice dispensers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Carry food, dishes, trays, or silverware from kitchens or supply departments to serving counters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform serving, cleaning, or stocking duties in establishments, such as cafeterias or dining rooms, to facilitate customer service.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Carry trays from food counters to tables for cafeteria patrons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock cabinets or serving areas with condiments and refill condiment containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve food to customers when waiters or waitresses need assistance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and polish counters, shelves, walls, furniture, or equipment in food service areas or other areas of restaurants and mop or vacuum floors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replenish supplies of food or equipment at steam tables or service bars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wash glasses or other serving equipment at bars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Carry linens to or from laundry areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Garnish foods and position them on tables to make them visible and accessible.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix and prepare flavors for mixed drinks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Slice and pit fruit used to garnish drinks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock refrigerating units with wines or bottled beer or replace empty beer kegs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
